SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.controller

Class UserController

java.lang.Object
it.unipi.tonightscall.controller.UserController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/user") public class UserController extends Object
REST Controller handling User operations.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserController

      public UserController(UserService userService, UserRepository userRepository)

  • Method Details

    • registerFriend

      @PostMapping("/RegisterFriend") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> registerFriend(@RequestBody Map<String,String> payload, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Registers a new friendship in the system.
      Parameters:
      payload - The user information transfer object containing registration details.
      authentication - Security context of the user performing the action.
      Returns:
      The updated UserDTO if successful, or an error message if the request is invalid.

    • getAllUsers

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getAllUsers(@RequestParam(defaultValue="0") @Min(0L) @jakarta.validation.constraints.Min(0L) int page)
      Retrieve a paginated list of all users.
      Parameters:
      page - The number of the page to retrieve (0-based index)
      Returns:
      A ResponseEntity containing a Page of Organizers or an error status

    • getUserById

      @GetMapping("/me") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> getUserById(org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Retrieve a specific user by the login
      Parameters:
      authentication - Security context of the user performing the action.
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity containing the user or 404 Not Found

    • attending

      @PostMapping("/attending") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> attending(@RequestBody Map<String,String> payload, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Registers a new attendance in the system.
      Parameters:
      payload - The user information transfer object containing registration details.
      authentication - Security context of the user performing the action.
      Returns:
      The updated EventDTO if successful, or an error message if the request is invalid.

    • review

      @PostMapping("/review") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> review(@RequestBody ReviewParameterDTO parameters, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Registers a new Review in the system.
      Parameters:
      parameters - The new ReviewParameterDTO containing the new review data.
      authentication - Security context of the user performing the action.
      Returns:
      The updated EventDTO if successful, or an error message if the request is invalid.

    • updateUser

      @PutMapping("/update") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> updateUser(@RequestBody UserDTO user, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Updates a User data in the system.
      Parameters:
      user - The new UserDTO containing the updated user's data.
      authentication - Security context of the user performing the action.
      Returns:
      The updated UserDTO if successful, or an error message if the request is invalid.

    • deleteFriendship

      @DeleteMapping("/friendship/{friendUsername}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> deleteFriendship(@PathVariable String friendUsername, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Removes a friendship from the system.
      Parameters:
      friendUsername - The id of the Event the Review is related to.
      authentication - Security context of the user performing the action.
      Returns:
      The updated UserDTO if successful, or an error message if the request is invalid.

    • deleteAttendace

      @DeleteMapping("/attending/{eventId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> deleteAttendace(@PathVariable String eventId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Remove an attendecy to one event
      Parameters:
      eventId - The id of the event
      authentication - The security context of the logged-in user
      Returns:
      ResponseEntity with the response

    • makeEventSuggestion

      @GetMapping("/suggestEvent") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> makeEventSuggestion(@RequestParam int distance, @RequestParam(required=false) LocalDate startingTime, @RequestParam(required=false,defaultValue="3") int limit, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Provides a list of suggested events based on user preferences, friends' reviews, and geographical proximity.
      Parameters:
      distance - Maximum distance in kilometers from the user's home.
      startingTime - Optional start date filter. Defaults to current date if not provided.
      limit - Maximum number of suggestions to return (default is 3).
      authentication - The security context of the logged-in user.
      Returns:
      A list of suggested EventDTOs or an error message.

    • makeFriendSuggestion

      @GetMapping("/suggestFriend") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> makeFriendSuggestion(@RequestParam(required=false,defaultValue="3") int limit, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication authentication)
      Suggests potential new friends based on mutual connections and shared interests.
      Parameters:
      limit - Maximum number of suggested friends to return (default is 3).
      authentication - The security context containing the current user's identity.
      Returns:
      A list of usernames of suggested friends, or an error message if the request fails.
